title: Russian-Indian Bean Pilaf
description: A unique fusion dish combining the flavors of Russia and India, featuring a hearty bean pilaf.
instructions: Heat ghee in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add diced cucumber and cook until slightly softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add green bean sprouts, Indian spices, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add cooked red kidney beans, Basmati rice, and 2 cups of water to the saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and garnish with chopped cilantro.
Note: Traditionally, Russian and Indian cuisines use different cooking techniques. This recipe combines elements from both to create a unique fusion dish.
